title: Miser-plant
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Miser-plants''' were [[Plant/Legends|plants]] native to the arid [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kamar/Legends|Kamar]].

Their survival in the dry climate of the [[Kamar Badlands|Badlands]] was due in large part to their ability to extract moisture from the air. Any moisture that a miser-plant trapped was secreted in small organs that resided in its roots. This feature of the miser-plant could be exploited by individuals trying to survive while stranded in the Badlands.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]''

==Sources==
